channel.title: Open Source Tools on UnityChip Verification
channel.description: Recent content in Open Source Tools on UnityChip Verification

item.title: Python-based Hardware Verification Framework — Toffee
item.description: Absorbs UVM verification methodology and introduces verification features from the software ecosystem

item.title: Multi-language Conversion Tool — Picker
item.description: Convert hardware circuits to software language packages with just one command

item.title: Chip Verification Agent — UCAgent
item.description: AI-driven chip verification, bringing unit-level hardware verification into a new intelligent stage
